title: Marketing reels production & scheduling plan
description: Commit to four hours daily for marketing by processing reels content and scheduling 1-3 reels per day for the first month, then backfill.
full_idea: Remember I need to spend four hours a day every single day marketing by having the marketing team go through all of the reels and generate all of the content, and then taking all of the marketing reels and scheduling them out into the future. 1 to 3 of them a day for the first month, then backfill from there.
source_text: Remember I need to spend four hours a day every single day marketing by having the marketing team go through all of the reels and generate all of the content, and then taking all of the marketing reels and scheduling them out into the future. 1 to 3 of them a day for the first month, then backfill from there.
